# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with attached EBS volumes for application data

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC for the instances
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Subnet for the instances
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: EC2 key pair
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - t3.xlarge
  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Description: AMI for the EC2 instances
  InstanceCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
  DataVolumeSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    MinValue: 8
    Description: Size in GiB for application data volume
  DataVolumeType:
    Type: String
    Default: gp3
    AllowedValues:
      - gp2
      - gp3
      - io1
      - io2
      - st1
      - sc1
  AllowedSshCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
  AppPort:
    Type: Number
    Default: 8080

Conditions:
  CreateInstance1: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 1], !Condition CreateAtLeast1]
  CreateInstance2: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 2], !Condition CreateAtLeast2]
  CreateInstance3: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3], !Condition CreateAtLeast3]
  CreateInstance4: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4], !Condition CreateAtLeast4]
  CreateInstance5: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5], !Condition CreateAtLeast5]
  CreateInstance6: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6], !Condition CreateAtLeast6]
  CreateInstance7: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7], !Condition CreateAtLeast7]
  CreateInstance8: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8], !Condition CreateAtLeast8]
  CreateInstance9: !Or [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9], !Condition CreateAtLeast9]
  CreateInstance10: !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateAtLeast1: !Not [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 0]]
  CreateAtLeast2: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 2]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateAtLeast3: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateAtLeast4: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateAtLeast5: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateAtLeast6: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateAtLeast7: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateAtLeast8: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  CreateAtLeast9: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Access for application EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSshCidr
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: !Ref AppPort
          ToPort: !Ref AppPort
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-instance-sg

  AppInstanceProfileRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Path: /
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-ec2-role

  AppInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: /
      Roles:
        - !Ref AppInstanceProfileRole

  Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateAtLeast1
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AppInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: 0
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
          SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-instance-1
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -xe
          mkdir -p /data
          if [ -b /dev/xvdf ]; then
            file -s /dev/xvdf | grep -q ext4 || mkfs -t ext4 /dev/xvdf
            mount /dev/xvdf /data
            grep -q "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" /etc/fstab || echo "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          fi

  Volume1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateAtLeast1
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Instance1.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-data-1

  VolumeAttachment1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateAtLeast1
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref Instance1
      VolumeId: !Ref Volume1

  Instance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateAtLeast2
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AppInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: 0
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
          SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-instance-2
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -xe
          mkdir -p /data
          if [ -b /dev/xvdf ]; then
            file -s /dev/xvdf | grep -q ext4 || mkfs -t ext4 /dev/xvdf
            mount /dev/xvdf /data
            grep -q "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" /etc/fstab || echo "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          fi

  Volume2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateAtLeast2
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Instance2.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-data-2

  VolumeAttachment2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateAtLeast2
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref Instance2
      VolumeId: !Ref Volume2

  Instance3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateAtLeast3
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AppInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
          DeviceIndex: 0
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
          SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-instance-3
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -xe
          mkdir -p /data
          if [ -b /dev/xvdf ]; then
            file -s /dev/xvdf | grep -q ext4 || mkfs -t ext4 /dev/xvdf
            mount /dev/xvdf /data
            grep -q "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" /etc/fstab || echo "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          fi

  Volume3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateAtLeast3
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt Instance3.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-data-3

  VolumeAttachment3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateAtLeast3
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref Instance3
      VolumeId: !Ref Volume3

  Instance4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateAtLeast4
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref AmiId
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AppInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:

          DeviceIndex: 0
          GroupSet:

      BlockDeviceMappings:

          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:

          Value: app-instance-4
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          set -xe
          mkdir -p /data
          if [ -b /dev/xvdf ]; then
            file -s /dev/xvdf | grep -q ext4 || mkfs -t ext4 /dev/xvdf

            grep -q "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" /etc/fstab || echo "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
          fi

    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateAtLeast4
    Properties:

      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSize
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-data-4

    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateAtLeast4
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref Instance4
      VolumeId: !Ref Volume4

          Value: app-instance-7

        Fn::Base64: !Sub |

          mkdir -p /data
          if [ -b /dev/xvdf ]; then
            file -s /dev/xvdf | grep -q ext4 || mkfs -t ext4 /dev/xvdf
            mount /dev/xvdf /data
            grep -q "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" /etc/fstab || echo "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab

            file -s /dev/xvdf | grep -q ext4 || mkfs -t ext4 /dev/xvdf

            grep -q "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" /etc/fstab || echo "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab

      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AppInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:

            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true

          Value: app-instance-10

          set -xe
          mkdir -p /data
          if [ -b /dev/xvdf ]; then
            file -s /dev/xvdf | grep -q ext4 || mkfs -t ext4 /dev/xvdf
            mount /dev/xvdf /data
            grep -q "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" /etc/fstab || echo "/dev/xvdf /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  Instance1Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast1
    Value: !Ref Instance1
  Instance2Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast2
    Value: !Ref Instance2
  Instance3Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast3
    Value: !Ref Instance3
  Instance4Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast4
    Value: !Ref Instance4
  Instance5Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast5
    Value: !Ref Instance5
  Instance6Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast6
    Value: !Ref Instance6
  Instance7Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast7
    Value: !Ref Instance7
  Instance8Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast8
    Value: !Ref Instance8
  Instance9Id:
    Condition: CreateAtLeast9
    Value: !Ref Instance9
  Instance10Id:
    Condition: CreateInstance10
    Value: !Ref Instance10
